embeds.title: User:Vessel Of Infinite Destruction ( -79)
embeds.description: Possessed Armor are now a Lead and hidden enemy. \|Fallen Necromancer no longer applies Blessed, now it has been replaced by Health Regen. \| Fallen Jester now applies Nimble — Cooldown increased from 12.5 to 17.5. Both explosion radius decreased from 10 to 5 \| Health Regen healing decreased from 4% to 2.5% — Tick rate delay of 0.025 removed \| Fallen Guardian health decreased from 150,000 to 125,000. \| Wave Structure changed.

embeds.title: Uploaded a new version of File:TDSLogoEarly1.png
User:Vessel Of Infinite Destruction ( +798)
embeds.description: Corpse Attribute Rework \| Fallen Shield buffed\: Health increased from 5,000 to 10,000. embeds.title: Deleted page Gunner (Disambiguation)
embeds.description: Do we really need this? Usually, these things in this are like not named after "gunner" because that is the less important part of their name. For Minigunner, mini is more important, golden minigunner is shortened to gmini, gatling gun while not a "gunner" it does contain "gun" which gets cut off. Majority of these items also share very little in common to cause any confusion \(and if there is no confusion or need for a long list of towers, why make it?\)

embeds.title: Slime Trooper ( -102)
embeds.description: There is nothing abnormal a tower hitting multiple enemies and getting the chance to generate many fireworks through that.
